subject: Re: External component has thrown an exception in M
body:
Hi Mingyu,
Sorry but it’s quite hard to help here now that desktop Warp/M are now up to date. All I can recommend is moving to the Linux version where hopefully a few more kinks have been ironed out…
We don’t yet provide windows builds for desktop Warp for version 2, only the Linux builds are available
Cheers,
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On Aug 9, 2024, at 03:53, Mingyu Jung <jmg0910@snu.ac.kr> wrote:
﻿Hi all,
I have an issue(the error message external component has thrown an exception) when I tried to extract unbinned subtomogram with 250 voxel box size in M. I imported relion data from 2x binned subtomogram to M. Anyone experience similar issue with me? There was an same issue in this forum but he resolved his problem using 1.5x binned extraction. I wanna try unbinned subtomogram.
Thank you!
Best,
Mingyu
